title: Linked collectors and determiners for: Fungal 28S Ribosomal RNA (LSU) RefSeq Targeted Loci Project..
author: Bionomia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Natural history specimen data linked to collectors and determiners held within, "Fungal 28S Ribosomal RNA (LSU) RefSeq Targeted Loci Project.". Claims or attributions were made on Bionomia by volunteer Scribes,  https://bionomia.net/dataset/bf3f09bd-3af6-45be-a2c4-bd5c285cab8a  using specimen data from the dataset aggregated by the Global Biodiversity Information Facility,  https://gbif.org/dataset/bf3f09bd-3af6-45be-a2c4-bd5c285cab8a . Formatted as a Frictionless Data package.
